judge_result.short_rationale: Source requires: do not induce vomiting, rinse mouth with water, seek immediate medical attention for any ingestion. Answer adds unsupported and dangerous advice to drink water or milk, weakens the vomiting prohibition with 'unless directed', and makes escalation conditional instead of immediate.
